I'm truly honored to be a part of @cry.america 's 2022 Gala series, "Heroes for Life.' 

This series returns after two years of virtual events that honor donors and project partners, who selflessly have  supported and continue to do so, the underprivileged children in India and the U.S throughout the life altering pandemic. 

I'll be joining Ms J. Lalithamma, founder and director of CRY America supported #projectpord who will be sharing inspiring stories of her organization 's work in Andhra Pradesh.

Join me at the CRY Gala this May, click the link in my story!

#childrights #fundraising #gala #houston #sandiego #newyorkcity #newjersey #seattle#education #childprotection

“An appeal to changemakers.”
At the age where a child should be living a carefree life, collecting the treasures of childhood, a little ray of sunshine is summoning the courage to fight the deadly march of a life-threatening ailment. Caged by the grips of Spinal Muscular Atrophy, a little Manha is trying to battle for her life! Manha’s helpless mother knows that any other treatment can buy her child time but only a drug name Zolgensma is a portal to her child’s life.
The tag of Manha’s life is 16 crores. After having no support from her in-laws and being left with the responsibility of her child on her own, her mother knocks on every door that could lead her to a friend in her time of need. 
I ask you all, humanitarians, to spare a minute for an SMA-warrior Manha and help her reach the goal of her life. Please share this campaign on your social media network and continue bestowing the tokens of your compassion in saving a mother’s child.
Find the tackling journey of Manha in this link:
https://www.impactguru.com/fundraiser/help-manha

#ImpactGuru #Crowdfunding #Fundraising #Donate #Support #Share #Help #Urgent #Critical #Medical #Healthcare #Childcare #SMA #SpinalMuscularAtrophy #RareDisease #IndiaFightsSMA #IndiaFightsRareDiseases #DoGood #BeKind #manha

With voices like his, the idea becomes clearer.

Rotoris isn’t about the watch. It’s about who you become in it.

#BecomeMore.

The perfect formula: Prayers for the soul, people for the love, and parties for the memories. That’s how you do Diwali. 

May the glow of a thousand lamps banish every shadow, and may the festival of lights bring new hope, prosperity, and success into all your lives.

Happy Diwali, my Insta fam! 🪔

Carrying a drop of the sun no matter where I go. 💛​

​
It's about you. If you win, it is you. If you lose, it is you.
Destiny is just a meeting between a prepared man and the right second.

हाल ही में मेरी BJP के National Party President श्री @nitinnabinbjp जी से मुलाक़ात हुई। इस खास मुलाक़ात के दौरान मेरे बड़े भाई और अभिनेता @vivekoberoi जी और जाने-माने ज्योतिषाचार्य @dwivediarvind जी भी मौजूद रहे।

इस दौरान हमारी श्रीमद्भगवद्गीता पर एक विशेष चर्चा हुई। यह बातचीत इतनी मधुर और दिलचस्प रही कि हम करीब डेढ़ घंटे तक लगातार बात करते रहे।

मैंने Nitin Nabin जी को बधाई भी दी, क्योंकि BJP ने बंगाल में ऐतिहासिक जीत दर्ज की है और BJP के National Party President के रूप में यह जीत नितिन जी की एक बड़ी उपलब्धि है। इस सफलता के लिए उन्हें हार्दिक बधाई और शुभकामनाएं।

#NitinNabin #BJP #WestBengal #BadaBusiness #DrVivekBindra

Nitin Nabin BJP, BJP National Party President, Vivek Oberoi latest, Arvind Dwivedi astrology, Bhagavad Gita discussion, Shrimad Bhagavad Gita podcast, BJP Bengal victory, BJP West Bengal win, political leadership India, Dr Vivek Bindra

Mothers don’t just raise us; they build the generations that come after us. 
My mother is the strength that shaped my sister and me. She held us through many storms, teaching us that goodness is the only thing that truly lasts. She gave our hearts a permanent home and our hands the fortitude we carry wherever we go.
My wife Priyanka is that anchor for our children Vivaan and Ameyaa. It is the same beautiful cycle being repeated in front of me, and this time I get to experience it from the other side. In the way she listens to our children and the kindness she has planted in their hearts, Priyanka is building their future with the love and patience only a mother can.
Then there is my sister, Meghna, who carries our mother’s light, raising her children Arjun and Shivaan with the same quiet strength and grace so they grow up to be just as kind and strong as she is.
To the woman who made me who I am, and the women shaping the next generation, thank you for everything.
Happy Mother’s Day to my world.

There is something about a father walking his
daughter down the aisle that undoes you completely. If you are a father yourself, you don't just witness it, you feel it, somewhere deep, somewhere wordless. 
Watching my dear brother @nikesharora at Ayesha's wedding, I saw exactly that, a father watching his little girl step into a new chapter, finding the grace to let her go, not out of his heart, but into her future. A bittersweet symphony that only a parent truly understands.​

@ayeshaarora may every chapter of this beautiful new life carry the warmth your father has poured into you
every single day.​

And Nikesh, to be welcomed into a moment this sacred is a gift. The way you and your family looked after me and Priyanka, ensuring we were okay and checking on the family even amidst the whirlwind of the wedding and the weight of regional tensions, truly shows the incredible depth of your spirit.​

The greatest advice I ever received came in six words. "Existence wants you to be you."
